query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Sweeping bands of vivid color arc across a dark field, with dominant warm oranges and cool blues interwoven with touches of green, red, yellow, and white, forming curved streaks of light that overlap and intermingle throughout the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Intentionally blurred streaks of clashing warm oranges and cool blues sweep across a dark background, their colors bleeding into each other with soft, indistinct edges and no directional lighting, creating a flat, dreamlike field of overlapping light arcs in vivid disharmony.
